message:
🌱 kubevela: [Feature] Support for explicit versioning of definitions (#785)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevela-6435-feature-support-for-explicit-versioning-of-definitions",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevela: [Feature] Support for explicit versioning of definitions",
+    "description": "[Feature] Support for explicit versioning of definitions. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevela deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevela version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nhelm list -n kubevela 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevela installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevela configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevela configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevela\n```\nThis feature request is to add the facility for component/trait etc definitions to explicitly specify a version as part of the definition.\n\nThe Application will then have the ability to refer to the definition version when using a definition."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] Support for explicit versioning of definitions",
+        "description": "I like the proposal, but have some doubts on the options that are being proposed. In terms of calling component versions I think adding the version as proposed by  will provide a user friendly approach for users deploying applications. To add an example of what I am understanding that would\n```yaml\n# latest (no version specified)\n    type: wb-service\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kubevela to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubevela:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade kubevela kubevela/kubevela --namespace kubevela\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevela\nhelm list -n kubevela\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nkubectl get events -n kubevela --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature] Support for explicit versioning of definitions\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I like the proposal, but have some doubts on the options that are being proposed. In terms of calling component versions I think adding the version as proposed by  will provide a user friendly approach for users deploying applications.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# latest (no version specified)\n    type: wb-service",
+        "# specific\n    type: wb-service@v3.0.1",
+        "# non-specific\n    type: >wb-service@v1.2"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubevela",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubevela"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubevela/kubevela/issues/6435",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubevela/kubevela"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 26,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "vela",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevela installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:27:30.821Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+  }
+}
